title: The Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Processing of Claims) Act, 1985
full_text: The Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Processing of Claims) Act, 1985 भोपाल गैस विभीषिका (दावा-कार्यवाही) अधिनियम, 1985 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198521 Act Number: 21 Enactment Date: 1985-03-29 Act Year: 1985 Short Title: The Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Processing of Claims) Act, 1985 Hindi Title: भोपाल गैस विभीषिका (दावा-कार्यवाही) अधिनियम, 1985 Long Title: An Act to confer certain powers on the Central Government to secure that claims arising out of, or connected with, the Bhopal gas leak disaster are dealt with speedily, effectively, equitably and to the best advantage of the claimants and for matters incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Chemicals and Fertilizers Department: Department of Chemicals and Petro-Chemicals Enforcement Date: 20-02-1985 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Processing of Claims) Act, 1985 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power of Central Government to represent claimants. Section 4. Claimant’s right to be represented by a legal practitioner. Section 5. Power of Central Government. Section 6. Commissioner and other officers and employees. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Power to delegate. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Limitation. Section 9. Power to frame a Scheme. Show Related Subordinates Section 10. Removal of doubts. Section 11. Overriding effect. Section 12. Repeal and saving.
